name: item
description: A composable list/menu row (v-next). The core item exposes leading (media) / content / trailing (actions) slots; element param selects the root tag (li|dd|dt|div); variant (default|active|danger|muted) and size (sm|md|lg) drive token-based colour + height; disabled dims the row. Extra attributes via trusted `attrs` + safe-escaped `dataAttrs`. The typed child partials mirror shadcn ItemTitle / ItemDescription / ItemHeader / ItemFooter / ItemGroup / ItemSeparator / ItemMedia. Plain HTML + Tailwind + --lv-* tokens, zero JS, CSP-clean.
docs: Copies the item partial (+ its item/title, item/description, item/header, item/footer, item/group, item/separator and item/media children) to your JTE root at lievit/item.jte, reached as @template.lievit.item(content=@`...`). v-next: element selects the root tag (li|dd|dt|div); variant (default|active|danger|muted); size (sm|md|lg); disabled dims the row. dataAttrs carries safe-escaped per-row data. Compose the content column from item/title + item/description (typed sub-parts); span the row with item/header / item/footer; wrap a list of rows in item/group (role=list, give each item element="li") and divide them with item/separator. Leading icon/image tile via item/media. The source is yours: edit freely.
